name: recruiter-deep-find-app
description: Standalone recruiter intake + live deep-search powered by Perplexity Sonar. Replit-ready.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
